_meta.description: Dynamic dashboard state — updated by agents after each run. The dashboard reads this file on load and polls for changes.

documents.title: Agent Charter
documents.description: Mission, 8-agent roster, operating principles, approval workflow, and external tool policy. The constitution of this agentic company.

documents.title: Leasing Playbook
documents.description: Commercial and residential leasing procedures — notice timelines, urgency tiers, renewal standard terms, vacancy response, and HOA leasing rules.

documents.title: Operations Playbook
documents.description: How to operate through the dashboard — daily workflow, triggering agents, reviewing outputs, data update procedures, and GitHub commit conventions.

documents.title: Brand Voice & Identity
documents.description: Crosby Development brand personality, voice by audience (residential, commercial, HOA, prospects), writing standards, Fair Housing language, and asset status.

documents.title: Triggering Architecture
documents.description: How agents get triggered — manual chat commands, Cowork scheduled tasks, and event-driven agent chains. Model assignments, execution environment, and scaling path.

documents.title: Data Schema Reference
documents.description: Field-level schema for all 6 JSON data files (properties, buildings, units, tenants, leases, hoa-lots). Entity relationships, update protocol, and current data status.

documents.title: Dashboard Update Protocol
documents.description: How agents update data/dashboard-state.json after each run — required post-run action for all agents. Defines the read-modify-write pattern, field schemas, and agent reference table.

documents.title: Building #1 Lease Review — April 2026
documents.description: Full lease schedule for all 13 Building #1 tenants with urgency tiers, upcoming 12-month calendar, and action items. One vacancy confirmed, two renewal letters required.

documents.title: Renewal Offer — Bayou CPR, Suite 301-A
documents.description: Draft renewal offer letter for Bayou CPR (Suite 301-A, 400 SF). Proposes 2-year extension at $713/mo (Year 1) + $734/mo (Year 2). Notice deadline: July 4, 2026 (94 days).

documents.title: Renewal Offer — Nirvana Massage, Suite 306
documents.description: Draft renewal offer letter for Nirvana Massage (Suite 306, 610 SF). Proposes 2-year extension at $1,372/mo (Year 1) + $1,413/mo (Year 2). Notice deadline: July 4, 2026 (94 days).

documents.title: Vacancy Listing — Suite 302, Building #1
documents.description: LoopNet/CoStar listing copy for Suite 302 (655 SF, 3rd floor). Sec National vacating June 30. Proposed asking rate: $30.37-$32.44/SF/year. Full-service lease, available July 1, 2026.

documents.title: Leasing Brief — Suite 302, Building #1
documents.description: One-page leasing brief for broker distribution. Suite 302 specs, building overview, campus amenities, location map notes, lease terms, and contact CTA.

documents.title: Email Blast — Suite 302, Building #1
documents.description: Email announcement for broker contacts and prospect list. 655 SF available July 1, asking $30.37-$32.44/SF/year. Ready for Gmail draft on approval.

documents.title: Market Snapshot — April 2026
documents.description: General mode: Monthly market snapshot across all Crosby-relevant asset classes — Northshore office, Metairie/Northshore multi-family, St. Tammany industrial, Mandeville HOA/townhome. Rate benchmarking, headlines, watch items.

documents.title: Comp Report — Sanctuary Office Park
documents.description: Property-specific mode: 6 comparable Northshore office properties for Suite 302 rate validation. Market median $26.50/SF. Recommends narrowing asking range from $30.37-$32.44 to $29.50-$31.00/SF.

activity.title: Market Snapshot — April 2026
activity.description: Monthly market snapshot generated across all asset classes. Northshore office, Metairie multi-family, St. Tammany industrial, Mandeville HOA.

activity.title: Comp Report — Sanctuary Office Park
activity.description: 6 comparable Northshore office properties for Suite 302 rate validation. Recommends $29.50-$31.00/SF.

activity.title: Vacancy Listing — Suite 302
activity.description: LoopNet listing, leasing brief, and email blast generated for Suite 302 (655 SF). Asking $30.37-$32.44/SF.

activity.title: Weekly Lease Deadline Scan
activity.description: Scanned all Building #1 leases. 1 vacancy confirmed (Suite 302), 2 renewals flagged (Bayou CPR, Nirvana Massage).

activity.title: Renewal Letters Drafted
activity.description: Draft renewal offers generated for Bayou CPR (Suite 301-A) and Nirvana Massage (Suite 306). Notice deadline: July 4, 2026.
